packaging.interpretation: Use for thumbnail/impression surfaces where YouTube shows a clickable package.

openingHold.interpretation: Use as an opening-hold proxy for Shorts feed behavior when Stayed to watch is not available in the repo workflow.

retention.interpretation: Use as the main completion and pacing signal for the Short itself.

requirements: Start with motion already in frame one.
Land the core claim before the first two seconds end.
Avoid greetings, logo cards, and slow context setup.

cadence.metadataPolicy: Use a distinct title and opening package on the follow-up release.
notes: Ship the shortest clear version first to get fast algorithmic feedback.
Use the follow-up recut to separate metadata learning from content-structure learning.
Do not republish the same file with only punctuation-level metadata changes.
